calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Anthony Cura, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:13 a.m.

Stacey A. Miller, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Porsche Leasing LTD. and Porsche Financial Services, Inc.
Jerrell Jackson, Supervisor of Collections and Customer Service for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Miller and Mr. Jackson appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Anthony Cura, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Possession of Personal Property, Breach of Express Written Contract, Money Lent and Account Stated was filed on February 5, 2021, and personally served on defendant Anthony Cura, an individual, on April 1, 2021.
Default as to defendant Anthony Cura, an individual, was entered on May 6, 2021.
Defendant Anthony Cura's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 7, 2021. This was an Clerical Error, and said answer was striken by Order of the Court on July 19, 2021.
Order for Writ of Possession {2018 Porsche Panamera} was filed on June 24, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 2, 2021.

Plaintiffs Porsche Leasing LTD. and Porsche Financial Services, Inc. submit the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement with Sonnen Motorcars......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Copy of State of California Certificate of Title...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Copy of Official Used Car Market Guide for July, 2021......................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Copies of Invoices re: Plaintiff's Litigation Costs........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Porsche Leasing LTD. and Porsche Financial Services, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Anthony Cura, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $66,833.26.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,569.40.
Attorney Fees - $2,226.67.
Costs - $781.44.

Total - $75,410.77.

Additionally, plaintiffs Porsche Leasing LTD. and Porsche Financial Services, Inc. are entitled to Judgment of Possession of the Personal Property identified as a 2018 Porsche Panamera, Vehicle Identification Number WP0AA2A7XJL106139 as against defendant Anthony Cura, an individual.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiffs STIPULATE to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:29 a.m.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-02-2021 Continued To Jan-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-10-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS PORSCHE LEASING LTD. AND PORSCHE FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.'s Application For Writ Of Possession.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
